page: Microsoft Azure EC48ads_cc_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ECADCCV5 server family. Powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor with x86_64 architecture, this instance features 48 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 24 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. It operates at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz and is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The hardware configuration also includes 1843 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage.

Benchmark evaluations place the EC48ads_cc_v5 in the top tier for several compute and memory metrics. It demonstrates strong multi-core CPU performance, as evidenced by its stress-ng multi-core score of 64703.14 and Geekbench multi-core score of 16005.0. Memory subsystem performance is also robust, with a PassMark memory score of 2911.56. In specialized workloads, the server exhibits strong capabilities in image processing, ray tracing, and encryption tasks. For language model workloads, it achieves strong inference speeds with smaller models, processing 2628.93 tokens per second for prompts and generating 329.72 tokens per second.

From a resource density perspective, the inclusion of 1843 GB of local storage alongside a substantial memory footprint offers high qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive and data-heavy workloads, eliminating the immediate need for external storage attachments. However, memory bandwidth for large blocks remains in the average tier, which may limit performance in memory-bound streaming applications. This server is highly suited for memory-optimized databases, large-scale data processing, enterprise applications, and medium-scale machine learning inference tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure EC48ads_cc_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECADCCV5 family, powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs running at 3.525 GHz, 384.0 GB of RAM, and 1843 GB of local storage with Premium Storage support. Benchmark data highlights strong multi-core CPU performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 64703.14 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 16005.0. It also delivers strong performance in encryption, image processing, and small-model LLM inference. While memory bandwidth for large blocks is average, the high memory-to-vCPU ratio and integrated local storage provide excellent qualitative cost efficiency for resource-dense workloads. This server is optimized for memory-intensive databases, enterprise applications, and data-processing pipelines.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC48ads_cc_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server with 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 1843 GB local storage, delivering strong multi-core performance for databases and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processing and integrated local storage for data-intensive enterprise workloads.
